metadata.source_research: David vs Goliath: are small LLMs any good? — fin.ai/research/david-vs-goliath-are-small-llms-any-good/
metadata.description: 100 user messages for is_issue binary classification. Labels mirror Intercom's ModernBERT issue classifier: true = addressable informational issue, false = non-informational. Non-issue examples cover all 17 categories defined in Table 1 of the paper.
non_issue_categories_covered: Indicating a question without stating it

samples.user_message: Hi
Hello there
Good morning
Hey!
Bye, thanks again
That's all, goodbye
See you
No
Not helpful at all
samples.notes: Negative sentiment, no new information for retrieval

samples.user_message: WTF
samples.notes: Expressive frustration, no actionable issue content

samples.user_message: Useless
samples.notes: Negative reaction, nothing for RAG to act on

samples.user_message: Ok
Got it, understood
Makes sense, thank you
samples.notes: Acknowledges and thanks, no follow-up issue

samples.user_message: Sure
Thank you so much!
Thanks, you're the best
Thx
Perfect!
Awesome, that worked
Great, exactly what I needed!
Cool, got it
Are you there?
samples.notes: User checking if agent is online, no issue

samples.user_message: Is anyone there?
Are you still online?
samples.notes: Connectivity probe, no actual problem stated

samples.user_message: How are you?
samples.notes: Social nicety, not a support issue

samples.user_message: Nice to meet you
Nice weather today
Merry Christmas!
Happy New Year
That's really interesting
samples.notes: Commentary on the conversation, not a new issue

samples.user_message: You answered that really fast!
samples.notes: Comment about the agent's speed, not a request

samples.user_message: Who are you?
samples.notes: Identity question, not a product issue

samples.user_message: Am I talking to a bot or a human?
samples.notes: Bot identity check, no actionable issue

samples.user_message: Are you an AI?
hmmm
haha ok
lol 😂
test
testing 1 2 3
ping
asldkjfasldkjf
aaa
Let me think about it for a second
brb
Never mind, ignore that last message
Don't worry about it, I figured it out myself
I have a question
samples.non_issue_category: Indicating a question without stating it
samples.notes: Intent announced but no actual question given yet

samples.user_message: Wait, I have something else to ask
samples.non_issue_category: Indicating a question without stating it
samples.notes: Signals upcoming question, no issue content yet

samples.user_message: I can't log into my account. I've tried resetting my password twice but I still get an error saying my credentials are invalid.
samples.issue_summary: User unable to log in despite multiple password resets; invalid credentials error persists
samples.notes: Clear actionable login issue with failure details

samples.user_message: My payment was charged twice for the same order. I need a refund for the duplicate charge.
samples.issue_summary: Duplicate charge on order, refund requested
samples.notes: Billing dispute with specific resolution ask

samples.user_message: The export to CSV isn't working — I click the button and nothing happens.
samples.issue_summary: CSV export button unresponsive
samples.notes: Broken UI feature with reproduction detail

samples.user_message: I upgraded to the Pro plan yesterday but I still can't access the advanced analytics dashboard.
samples.issue_summary: Pro plan features not unlocked after upgrade

samples.user_message: How do I add a custom domain to my workspace?
samples.issue_summary: User needs instructions for adding a custom domain
samples.notes: Informational question with clear actionable answer

samples.user_message: I accidentally deleted a project — is there any way to recover it?
samples.issue_summary: Deleted project recovery request
samples.notes: Data loss scenario with recovery intent

samples.user_message: The mobile app keeps crashing every time I try to open the inbox on my iPhone 14.
samples.issue_summary: Mobile app crash on inbox open (iPhone 14)

samples.user_message: I need to cancel my subscription before the next billing cycle on the 15th. How do I do that?
samples.issue_summary: User wants to cancel subscription before renewal date

samples.user_message: We're getting a 403 Forbidden error when calling the /messages endpoint with our API key.
samples.issue_summary: API returning 403 on /messages endpoint
samples.notes: Technical API error with endpoint and error code

samples.user_message: My team members are not receiving the invite emails I'm sending from the workspace settings.
samples.issue_summary: Team invite emails not being delivered
samples.notes: Email delivery failure for onboarding flow

samples.user_message: What's the difference between the Business and Enterprise plans?
samples.issue_summary: User needs plan comparison information

samples.user_message: The webhook I set up is not firing when a new contact is created. I've checked the configuration and it looks correct.
samples.issue_summary: Webhook not triggering on new contact creation despite correct config

samples.user_message: I've been waiting 48 hours for my account verification email and it hasn't arrived.
samples.issue_summary: Account verification email not received after 48 hours

samples.user_message: Can I use the same account on multiple devices at the same time?
samples.issue_summary: Query about multi-device concurrent access policy
samples.notes: Clear informational question about product behavior

samples.user_message: My reports are showing data from last month even though I selected 'This Week' as the date range.
samples.issue_summary: Date range filter not working correctly in reports
samples.notes: UI bug with clear reproduction step

samples.user_message: I'm trying to connect Salesforce but I keep getting an 'Authorization failed' error on step 3 of the OAuth flow.
samples.issue_summary: Salesforce OAuth integration failing at step 3 with authorization error
samples.notes: Third-party integration failure with specific failure point

samples.user_message: How do I bulk import contacts from a CSV file?
samples.issue_summary: User needs guidance on bulk CSV contact import
samples.notes: How-to question for a supported feature

samples.user_message: I was charged $149 but my plan is supposed to be $99 per month. Can you check what happened?
samples.issue_summary: Unexpected billing overcharge — $149 vs expected $99

samples.user_message: The SSO login stopped working for our team after we changed our IdP from Okta to Azure AD.
samples.issue_summary: SSO broken after IdP migration from Okta to Azure AD

samples.user_message: Is it possible to restrict which IP addresses can access our workspace?
samples.issue_summary: User asking about IP allowlisting capability
samples.notes: Feature availability question relevant to security

samples.user_message: The live chat widget is not showing up on our website even though I've added the embed code.
samples.issue_summary: Chat widget not rendering despite embed code being added

samples.user_message: I need to downgrade from Enterprise to Business but I can't find the option in my billing settings.
samples.issue_summary: Unable to find downgrade option from Enterprise to Business plan
samples.notes: UI navigation or feature gap for plan downgrade

samples.user_message: My colleague can see all customer conversations but I can only see the ones assigned to me. How do we fix this?
samples.issue_summary: Permissions mismatch — user has restricted conversation visibility vs colleague

samples.user_message: We want to migrate all our data to a new account. What's the process for that?
samples.issue_summary: User asking about data migration process between accounts
samples.notes: Account management question requiring procedural answer

samples.user_message: The search in the knowledge base is returning completely unrelated articles. It doesn't seem to work properly.
samples.issue_summary: Knowledge base search returning irrelevant results

samples.user_message: I submitted a GDPR data deletion request two weeks ago and haven't heard anything back yet.
samples.issue_summary: GDPR deletion request with no response after two weeks

samples.user_message: Can you tell me what data you store about end users? We need this for our privacy policy.
samples.issue_summary: User needs data retention/storage information for compliance purposes
samples.notes: Informational data privacy question with business purpose

samples.user_message: The integration with Stripe stopped syncing transactions after the 10th of this month.
samples.issue_summary: Stripe integration stopped syncing after a specific date

samples.user_message: I'm getting a 'Storage limit exceeded' error but we still have 40% of our storage unused according to the dashboard.
samples.issue_summary: Storage limit error contradicts dashboard showing 40% free space

samples.user_message: How do I set up automated follow-up messages for leads who haven't responded in 3 days?
samples.issue_summary: User needs setup guidance for automated follow-up sequences

samples.user_message: Our entire team was logged out simultaneously today and nobody can get back in.
samples.issue_summary: Mass simultaneous logout affecting the entire team, unable to log back in

samples.user_message: The API documentation says the rate limit is 1000 req/min but we're hitting 429 errors at only 200 req/min.
samples.issue_summary: Rate limiting occurring at 200 req/min despite documented 1000 req/min limit
samples.notes: Documented vs actual rate limit discrepancy

samples.user_message: I need to give a contractor temporary access to our account for two weeks. Is there a way to set an expiry on a user account?
samples.issue_summary: User asking about temporary/expiring user access capability
samples.notes: Feature capability question for access management

samples.user_message: Our invoice for March shows $0 charged but we were definitely billed. The money left our account but nothing shows in the billing portal.
samples.issue_summary: Billing portal showing $0 for March despite confirmed bank charge
samples.notes: Billing record inconsistency with real-world charge

samples.user_message: The canned response I created is not showing up when my agents type '/' in the reply box.
samples.issue_summary: Canned response not appearing in slash command trigger
samples.notes: Feature malfunction with specific reproduction trigger

samples.user_message: Do you offer HIPAA-compliant data processing? We're in the healthcare sector.
samples.issue_summary: User asking about HIPAA compliance for healthcare use case
samples.notes: Compliance qualification question with industry context

samples.user_message: I'm trying to tag all conversations from last quarter as 'resolved' in bulk but the bulk action only applies to 25 at a time.
samples.issue_summary: Bulk action capped at 25 conversations, insufficient for large backlog

samples.user_message: The email notifications stopped working after I changed my notification settings back to 'all'. It was working before.
samples.issue_summary: Email notifications broken after settings change to 'all'
samples.notes: Settings change broke a previously working feature

samples.user_message: Can I white-label the chat widget to remove your branding and use our own logo?
samples.issue_summary: Query about white-labeling and custom branding for the chat widget

samples.user_message: We have two separate accounts for our two brands. Can we merge them into one without losing any data?
samples.issue_summary: User asking about merging two accounts without data loss
samples.notes: Account consolidation question with data preservation concern

samples.user_message: The translation of the chat widget is wrong — it's showing Spanish text even though our locale is set to French.
samples.issue_summary: Widget showing wrong language (Spanish) despite French locale setting

samples.user_message: I'm trying to generate an API token but the 'Generate' button is greyed out under Developer Settings.
samples.issue_summary: API token generation button disabled in Developer Settings
samples.notes: UI element inaccessible, blocking developer workflow

samples.user_message: My subscription was paused automatically — I never requested this. What happened?
samples.issue_summary: Subscription paused unexpectedly without user request
samples.notes: Unexpected account state change requiring investigation

samples.user_message: The onboarding checklist says I need to install the tracking script, but I can't find where to get the script in my account.
samples.issue_summary: User cannot locate tracking script required for onboarding step
samples.notes: Onboarding blocker with specific missing element

samples.user_message: I want to understand how your AI decides which article to show to a customer. Is there documentation on this?
samples.issue_summary: User seeking documentation on AI article selection logic
samples.notes: Documentation/explainability question with clear informational answer

samples.user_message: We've been on the annual plan but want to switch to monthly billing. Is that possible and how do I do it?
samples.issue_summary: User wants to switch from annual to monthly billing
samples.notes: Billing plan change request with how-to question

samples.user_message: The auto-close rule I set up to close conversations after 24 hours of inactivity doesn't seem to be running.
samples.issue_summary: Auto-close rule not executing as configured

samples.user_message: I accidentally sent a message to a customer with placeholder text like {{customer_name}} that wasn't filled in. How did that happen?
samples.issue_summary: Template variable not substituted before message was sent to customer

samples.user_message: We need to export all conversation transcripts for a compliance audit. How do we do a full export?
samples.issue_summary: Full conversation transcript export needed for compliance audit

samples.user_message: The AI is answering in English even though the customer is writing in German. Why is it ignoring the language?
samples.issue_summary: AI responding in wrong language (English) despite German customer messages
samples.notes: Language detection or response generation bug
